name: 24/7 Golf - Ludington
about: 24/7 Golf is an indoor golf and pickleball simulator venue operating 24 hours a day, 365 days a year. It utilizes Trackman iO technology across multiple locations in Michigan, offering a space for casual play and serious practice. Patrons can book simulator bays by the hour for individuals or groups, with the option to join leagues or purchase memberships for extended access. The facilities are designed to accommodate various group sizes and events, from solo practice to large parties and corporate outings.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access allows for play at any time of day or night
Premium Trackman iO technology provides accurate ball and club data
Hourly pricing model is flexible and accommodates any group size
Locations are in prime areas for both residents and visitors
Facility rentals available for events and parties

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB (Bring Your Own Food) is permitted
BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) is permitted

simulator_hardware.notes: Latest technology combining radar, infrared and high-speed imaging for real-time data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you are required to bring your own golf clubs to use the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue allows you to bring your own food and beverages (BYOB).

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A typical round of 18 holes takes approximately 1 to 1.5 hours per simulator bay.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and can accommodate children for play and events.
